prompt: Use case: logo-brand. Asset type: SISP MapDrive logomark PNG, final target 1024x1024, transparent after processing. Primary request: an abstract mark for SISP MapDrive: a network drive / plug motif fused into a hexagonal cluster node, same hexagon-cluster family as AppHub, minimal and scalable to 16px. Style/medium: modern scientific-tech, calm, flat geometric vector look, single-weight ~2px line work, soft depth, high-quality polished app/brand asset. Composition/framing: centered icon, generous padding, balanced square composition, crisp edges, readable as a tiny favicon. Color palette: SISP teal #11695f to deep slate gradient, subtle teal tint, no other dominant colors. Constraints: no text, no letters, no watermark, no mockup, no paper texture. Generated on flat #ff00ff chroma-key background for alpha removal.

Use case: logo-brand. Asset type: SISP MapDrive wordmark PNG, final target 1600x400, transparent after processing. Primary request: the SISP MapDrive wordmark: the abstract MapDrive mark at left, followed by the exact word MapDrive in Inter SemiBold 600 deep slate, with a small SISP teal tag near the wordmark. Exact text: MapDrive and SISP only. Style/medium: modern scientific-tech brand wordmark, calm flat geometric vector, professional SaaS product identity, same hexagon-cluster family as AppHub. Composition/framing: wide horizontal composition, centered vertically, logo mark left, MapDrive text large and crisp, SISP tag smaller in teal, generous transparent padding. Color palette: SISP teal #11695f, deep slate #131a19, subtle teal-to-slate gradient only on mark. Generated on flat #ff00ff chroma-key background for alpha removal.

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: SISP MapDrive landing page hero background PNG, final target 1600x1000, filled. Primary request: dark teal to deep slate gradient with a faint geometric mesh of connected hexagon nodes, network drive nodes, and plug nodes; low contrast; no text. Style/medium: modern scientific-tech, calm flat geometric vector background with subtle soft depth, professional SaaS hero art. Composition/framing: wide 16:10 hero background, abstract mesh flowing diagonally with open negative space for web UI overlay, no central logo, no hard vignette. Color palette: SISP teal #11695f fading into deep slate #131a19 and #0c2422, faint lines in muted teal and slate. Constraints: filled background, no transparent areas, no words, no letters, no UI screenshots, no people, no watermark; keep pattern low contrast and suitable behind text/cards.
